queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between negative checking account balances and increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between minimal savings account balances and reduced credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigating the contribution of absent checking account status to elevated credit default probability.
